creator: marcarianalexandru@gmail.com
text:
Hey Rodrigo! Thanks for the info. Following HEAD is a bit more difficult since there are a lot of moving parts especially when you have to maintain tens if not hundreds of servers. I thought this update will benefit more than one person given the bugs that were fixed in 8.1.8 and 8.1.9. Another option would be to use the poudriere-devel and its overlay feature so I can cherry-pick some of the stuff from HEAD. 

Once again thanks very much!
